metaDescription: Recent work from the barbers at A Cut Above Barber Shop in San Clemente. Skin fades, lineups, designs, military cuts, beard work, women's haircuts, and color.

header.title: Cuts we're proud of.
header.subtitle: A look at the variety of work coming out of our chairs — military fades, custom designs, gentleman's cuts, and women's styles.

footerNote: See a cut you like? Mention the photo when you call or text — we can match the look on you.
ctaHeading: See a style you like? Let's book it.
